purpose: Empirical L1Hyp clause diagnostic for the L-1 hard-bar / active-count bridge candidate (L1-F).

H1.note: Active masses + delta-supports + connectivity + graph distances.

H2.note: Peak-based birth heights b_j^U = U(p_j); h_min is min over active slots.

H3.note: Threshold-scan max-min bridge height between peaks. Exact min-cut height H_cut^jk not implemented (Level 2 future).

value.comment: raw margin = h_min - max_bridge - l_min; r_assoc and r_birth not estimable from data.

H4.note: L1Hyp constants r_assoc, r_birth not derivable empirically.

H5.note: Stable slot-to-bar association map A_bar requires birth-vertex tracking through superlevel filtration; not implemented (Level 2).

H6.note: Slot-internal full-graph H_0 secondary bar; full local barcode on G_j^r not implemented.

H7.note: Aggregate residual height + barcode on R_inact alone.

H8.note: Exact integer count comparison. K_bar > K_act => possible non-slot bar overcount; K_bar < K_act => undercount (association failure).

H9.note: Gap proxy; true tau_tie requires plateau detection on field.

H10.note: Local-to-global barcode transfer is the central theorem-grade gap. It cannot be empirically measured; requires proof or counterexample.
